baseline_label: Alpha ToT baseline: ResNet18 no maxpool
validation_rule: A6a candidate must survive three-seed validation comparison; test is report-only
final_status: Alpha final loss remains CE one-hot
paper_interpretation: CE+EMD lambda=0.02 had only a seed42 tie-break signal and became weaker than A2 CE after three seeds.
notes: Do not migrate A6 loss to GMU or final Alpha model.

validation_rule: A7 must improve validation metrics over A4c GMU; test is report-only
final_status: Alpha final end-to-end model uses GMU without handcrafted scalars
paper_interpretation: main_5feat does not provide stable validation gain on top of GMU; Val Acc ties but Val MAE worsens.
notes: A7 gate_tot/gate_toa are GMU image-branch gates, not handcrafted fusion weights.

baseline_label: Alpha ToT baseline: ResNet18 no maxpool
validation_rule: Select end-to-end multimodal architecture by validation balance and physical interpretability; test reports generalization only
final_status: Alpha final end-to-end multimodal model is dual_stream_gmu_aux + ToT/relative_minmax ToA + CE + no handcrafted
paper_interpretation: GMU is not chosen because of test back-selection; it has competitive validation accuracy, better A4c Val MAE, and gate behavior consistent with ToT-main/ToA-auxiliary physics.
notes: A4b post-hoc fusion remains expert-level reference, not the final deployable end-to-end architecture.

baseline_label: Proton_C_7 ToT baseline: ResNet18 no maxpool
validation_rule: B3a selects by validation accuracy; B3b verifies by three seeds
final_status: Proton recommended loss is CE + ExpectedMAE lambda=0.05
paper_interpretation: ExpectedMAE improves validation accuracy, MAE, macro-F1, and high-angle behavior relative to the CE baseline.
notes: CE+EMD lambda=0.05 remains a strong optional ordered-loss control.
